package rulefixtures

import (
	"strconv"
)

// scenario for fmt_errorf_without_wrap_verb: `fmt.Errorf("context: %v", err)` instead of `%w`
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: warning.
func scenario483Negative(values []int) []string {
	out := make([]string, 0, len(values))
	for _, value := range values {
		out = append(out, strconv.Itoa(value))
	}
	return out
}
